summary: End-to-end testing complete for Plataforma Pedagógica MVP. Backend pytest 17/17 passed (auth, register, /me, medidas/tags, students CRUD with GET-verification, filters, stats, CSV export, protected endpoints). Frontend manual flow: login (admin@escola.pt/admin123) → /, Dashboard KPIs + Recharts visible, Students page list/create dialog with all fields + tags + notes works (success toast 'Aluno criado'), theme toggle works, logout redirects to /login, protected route /alunos without auth redirects to /login. No critical issues found.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') - migrate to lifespan handler in future.
JWT_SECRET fallback absent (good); however hash_password/verify_password run sync inside async route - acceptable for current load but consider asyncio.to_thread for high concurrency.
CORS allow_origins includes 'http://localhost:3000' even in prod - consider env-driven list.
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed students via pytest. One TEST_FE_Aluno + João Silva remain in DB from frontend test (not cleaned).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers all 17 endpoints and is reusable. Auth uses httpOnly cookies with SameSite=None+Secure. Frontend uses data-testids: login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, tab-login, tab-register. Students page works at /alunos. Theme toggle works. Bcrypt hashes verified ($2b$). Seed admin idempotent (updates password if changed).
